name: DetailTypeEnum
summary: The detail type defines what kind of a detail is in question.

enum_values.name: END
enum_values.summary: With the detail type end, the X-axis is oriented towards the part's center point.

enum_values.name: INTERMEDIATE
enum_values.summary: With the detail type intermediate, the X-axis is oriented towards the end point of the part.

enum_values.name: INTERMEDIATE_REVERSE
enum_values.summary: With the detail type intermediate reverse, the X-axis is oriented towards the start point of the part.
